title: Avoid Unicode grapheme clusters inside regex character classes
description: Avoid using Unicode grapheme clusters inside regex character classes as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Unicode grapheme clusters found inside regex character classes
recommendation: Avoid using Unicode grapheme clusters inside regex character classes

noncompliant.description: Unicode grapheme clusters inside character class

compliant.description: No Unicode grapheme clusters inside character class

why_is_this_an_issue: Unicode grapheme clusters can match multiple Unicode characters, which can lead to unexpected results when used inside regex character classes.
how_to_fix: Replace Unicode grapheme clusters with individual characters or character ranges.
